headline: The White House reversed its two-week ban on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models while interpretability and agent techniques broke out across the field.
body: The dominant policy event was the White House dropping export controls and restrictions on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models after a two-week freeze, with Anthropic set to restore Fable access on July 1. On the technical side, a cluster of interpretability and agent-building methods broke out together: trajectory data, agent skills, behavioral auditing, ablation, and masking all posted top momentum, alongside newer entrants including adaptive gating, feature modulation, and feature splitting. Model Context Protocol featured prominently in enterprise agent work, powering Google Cloud's FynanceAI orchestration across Oracle, Looker, and vector stores. In model evaluation, a review found Claude Sonnet 5 underperforming GLM-5.2 and Opus at higher cost.
